title: centaurea × lykana
intro: Centaurea × lykana, also known as Cornflower, is a hybrid plant species in the family Asteraceae, characterized by its vibrant blue flowers and broad, flat leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds, inflammation, and respiratory issues, due to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Centaurea × lykana include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
